content: A curiosity-driven hierarchical A2A protocol can be structured where a top-level meta-agent dynamically curates which specialized sub-agents get to interact and share information, based on the meta-agent’s intrinsic reward from discovering unresolved knowledge gaps across sub-agent memory stores. This design leverages 2024 SOTA active memory architectures to let the network of agents autonomously expand its collective problem-solving scope without explicit human task programming.
